Event: Royal Challenge - Season 48
Event Date: 01/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: A321
Daytime Star Shard

Triggers: Once in a while

Transference of Life
Lightning strikes 4 enemy units with the lowest magic armor. The lightning deals 500000 magic damage and casts electric pulse upon the target for 4 sec. Every time the unit affected with electric pulse uses an ability, a lightning bolt hits it, dealing 400000 magic damage to it, and to all enemy units in a small radius. All affected units are also stunned for 2 sec. Additionally, the physical and magic armor of the ability's primary target are reduced by 25% for 4 sec., and it receives 350000 magic damage for 4 sec. If the ability's target dies within 4 sec. after being hit with lightning, an allied unit is resurrected with 20% health.

Requirements: 90-100
